constraints.constraint_text: All audit trail data must be retained for a minimum of 7 years in immutable storage, per central bank data retention regulation.
constraints.source_ref: Central Bank Data Governance Framework v3.2, §8.4

constraints.constraint_text: The solution must integrate with the existing core ledger API without requiring a version upgrade of the ledger platform (current: v14.2).
Go-live must occur before the Q3 regulatory reporting deadline (30 September 2026).
Total programme budget is capped at the approved envelope; no supplemental budget request is available for this financial year.
